chunks.title: Call for Deliverance
chunks.reason: The psalmist calls to Yahweh in distress and asks for rescue from a lying tongue.

chunks.title: Judgment on the Deceitful
chunks.reason: A rhetorical question followed by imagery of divine punishment against the deceitful tongue.

chunks.title: Complaint Against Enemies
chunks.reason: The psalmist laments dwelling among hostile people and contrasts his love for peace with their warlike nature.
